# mpp-payment-demos — Payment Demos

This site hosts a payment demos page showcasing HTTP 402 machine payments.
It is NOT a general-purpose API. The only paid endpoint is the widget endpoint below.

## Paid Endpoint: Widget Tokens

GET https://mpp-payment-demos-l6h8.vercel.app/api/mpp/widgets

Purchase widget tokens. Returns a JSON array of widget objects.

### Parameters

- quantity (integer, optional): Number of widget tokens to purchase. Default: 1. Min: 1. Max: 10.

### Pricing

- 0.05 usd per widget
- Formula: quantity * 0.05 usd
- Example: quantity=3 costs 0.15 usd

### Payment Methods

1. Tempo USDC (recommended for agents)
   - Network: Tempo mainnet
   - Token: USDC (0x20C000000000000000000000b9537d11c60E8b50)
   - Use: tempo request "https://mpp-payment-demos-l6h8.vercel.app/api/mpp/widgets?quantity=1"

2. Stripe card (Shared Payment Token / SPT)
   - Requires Stripe machine payments access

3. Stripe crypto deposit
   - Stripe-managed deposit address; on-chain settlement via Tempo
   - See /api/stripe/mpp-crypto

### Usage

Before spending, check the schema endpoint:
  GET https://mpp-payment-demos-l6h8.vercel.app/api/mpp/widgets/docs

Or the machine-readable service manifest:
  GET https://mpp-payment-demos-l6h8.vercel.app/.well-known/mpp.json

### Example (Tempo wallet CLI)

  tempo request "https://mpp-payment-demos-l6h8.vercel.app/api/mpp/widgets?quantity=1"

### Example Response (200 OK)

  {
    "widgets": [{ "id": "widget_1234_0", "sku": "widget", "name": "Widget" }],
    "quantity": 1,
    "total_charged": "0.05 usd"
  }
